tasks.title: Prediction lineage tracking — verify in production
tasks.description: Confirm 14 lineage columns populate correctly in tomorrow's pipeline run
tasks.notes: Verified 2026-03-06. All 14 columns present in all_forecasts.parquet (29.3M rows, 426 entities). 11 active columns fully populated for model-based predictions. 3 placeholders (quantile_mapping, hyperparameter_hash, notes) structurally in place. ~19.2% nulls on model-specific cols are correct (fallback_ratio + aggregate methods). Report: research/lineage-verification-2026-03-06.md

tasks.title: Build Park Intel automated feed
tasks.description: Daily automated feed for #park-intel — today's operating hours across all 12 parks, last-minute closures/schedule changes, special events, yesterday's actuals vs predictions. Runs daily at 6:30am.
tasks.notes: From Discord workflow report. Needs: park hours API/scraping, event calendar integration, accuracy comparison from pipeline outputs. Posts to #park-intel channel.

tasks.title: Content: Thanksgiving 2026 Crowd Predictions
tasks.description: Blog/article analyzing predicted Thanksgiving 2026 crowds. Angle: might be the best year to visit in late November. Include year-over-year comparison (5 years), park-specific callouts, and day-by-day breakdown of Thanksgiving week.
tasks.notes: From #content-ideas. Publish by mid-October to catch planners. Suggested angles: Thanksgiving 2026 vs last 5 years, which parks benefit most, best/worst days of the week. Needs forecast data closer to publish date.

tasks.title: Install Claude Desktop app + MCP Discord integration for Barney

tasks.notes: Goal: Let Barney (Claude on claude.ai/desktop) participate in Discord directly via MCP. Download from claude.ai/download. Then set up Discord MCP server in Claude Desktop settings.

tasks.title: Discord: Add forum tags to #ideas and #bugs-feedback
tasks.description: Add tags to the new forum channels. Ideas: pipeline, streaming, discord, website, content, modeling, business, agent-idea. Bugs: bug, enhancement, visual, data, pipeline, urgent.
tasks.notes: Server Settings → Channels → select forum → Tags. API can't set available_tags via our current tooling.

tasks.title: Discord: Convert #alerts to Announcement channel
tasks.description: Change #alerts channel type to Announcement in Discord Server Settings. API doesn't support channel type conversion.
tasks.notes: Server Settings → Channels → #alerts → change type to Announcement. Channel ID: 1479471928262529088.

tasks.title: Discord: Create scheduled events
tasks.description: Create recurring scheduled events: Daily Pipeline Run (6:00 AM EST daily), Morning Briefing (7:30 AM EST daily), Weekly Review (Friday 10:00 AM EST).
tasks.notes: Server Settings → Scheduled Events → Create Event. API event-create had issues.

tasks.title: Discord: Create roles (Human, Agent, Pipeline-Bot, Admin)
tasks.description: Create Discord roles for team organization. Human = Fred, Agent = all AI agents, Pipeline-Bot = automated pipeline posts, Admin = full access.
tasks.notes: Server Settings → Roles → Create Role. Assign appropriate permissions and colors.

tasks.title: Discord: Restrict #fred-wilma to Fred + bot only
tasks.description: Set channel permissions so only Fred and the bot can see/send in #fred-wilma. Private command center.
tasks.notes: Channel Settings → Permissions → deny @everyone view, allow Fred + bot. Channel ID: 1479351572386414675.

tasks.title: Discord: Set up auto-moderation rules
tasks.description: Configure auto-mod: spam filter, link filter for non-admin, rate limiting on public channels.
tasks.notes: Server Settings → Safety Setup → AutoMod. Not available via API, needs manual setup.

tasks.title: 🔴 Confirm accuracy eval is working
tasks.description: Verify that src/evaluate_forecast_accuracy.py runs correctly and produces valid output. Was flagged as half-fixed by Gazoo on Mar 6.
tasks.notes: VERIFIED WORKING: Script ran successfully producing MAE=9.4 min, bias=2.6, MAPE=91.0% for 24 dates evaluated. WTI summary shows MAE=6.8, bias=1.4, 233 park-dates. Both slot-level and WTI evaluation working correctly.

tasks.title: 🔴 Deploy inverse_freq weighting
tasks.description: Switch real actuals weighting from 3.5x to inverse_freq. Experiment showed MAE 6.96 (inverse_freq) vs 7.04 (current 3.5x). Tested and won — needs deployment.
tasks.notes: Barney pipeline item #2. Related to task-007 (weighting review). This is the specific winner — deploy it. Source: Barney pipeline audit 2026-03-07.

tasks.title: 🔴 Centralize park_code mappings
tasks.description: Create src/park_codes.py as single canonical park_code mapping. Scattered CASE statements across scripts caused the EU/Europa Park bug. One source, imported everywhere.
tasks.notes: Barney pipeline item #3. Root cause of silent plausibility errors. Source: Barney pipeline audit 2026-03-07.

tasks.title: 🟡 Add conversion model validation gate
tasks.description: Weekly Monday retrain is unconditional. Bad data produces silently worse model. Add holdout MAE comparison before deploying new conversion model.
tasks.notes: Barney pipeline item #4. Safety gate: compare new model MAE vs current before swapping. Source: Barney pipeline audit 2026-03-07.

tasks.title: 🟡 Remove 2>/dev/null from pipeline state checks
tasks.description: Pipeline state checks swallow errors with 2>/dev/null. These control whether training runs — silencing errors here is dangerous.
tasks.notes: Barney pipeline item #5. In run_daily_pipeline.sh. Source: Barney pipeline audit 2026-03-07.

tasks.title: 🟡 Move Cloudflare account ID to ~/.env
tasks.description: Cloudflare account ID is hardcoded in run_daily_pipeline.sh. Move to ~/.env for security and maintainability.
tasks.notes: Barney pipeline item #6. Quick cleanup. Source: Barney pipeline audit 2026-03-07.

tasks.title: 🟢 Per-entity synthetic quality scoring
tasks.description: Synthetic data hurts ~40% of entities. Build per-entity quality scoring and train real_only where bias exceeds ±3 min. Estimated ~5% MAE improvement — biggest modeling win available.
tasks.notes: Barney pipeline item #7. Biggest accuracy win on the table. Requires entity-level bias analysis, scoring framework, conditional training logic. Source: Barney pipeline audit 2026-03-07.

tasks.title: 🟢 Investigate julia-ml/ directory integration
tasks.description: Unclear how Julia training is integrated into the pipeline. Barney needs to understand this before making training architecture decisions.
tasks.notes: Barney pipeline item #8 (from BARNEY.md). Read before making training architecture decisions. Source: Barney's BARNEY.md cold-start file.
